software-engineer.title: Software Engineer
software-engineer.subtitle: Full-Stack Software Engineer
software-engineer.tagline: Building scalable systems & elegant user experiences
software-engineer.summary: Experienced full-stack software engineer with 8+ years building scalable web applications and cloud-native systems. Passionate about clean architecture, developer experience, and shipping products users love. Proven track record of leading high-impact projects from conception to production, and mentoring teams to move faster without breaking things.

highlights: Architected event-driven microservices platform serving 1M+ daily active users
Led team of 5 engineers, improving sprint velocity by 40% through better tooling and process
Reduced infrastructure costs by 30% via AWS optimization, caching layers, and query tuning
Established company-wide code review standards and engineering design doc culture
Built 3 production web apps from 0 → 1 using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Implemented real-time collaboration features with WebSockets, boosting engagement 25%
Automated CI/CD pipelines cutting release cycle from 2 days to under 30 minutes
Developed RESTful APIs consumed by 50k+ daily users with 99.9% uptime
Optimized critical SQL queries reducing average page load by 60%
Open-source CLI tooling adopted by 500+ developers in the community

projects.name: Microservices Platform
projects.description: Event-driven architecture handling 1M+ daily transactions with 99.9% uptime and zero-downtime deploys.

projects.name: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Live data visualization platform processing 100k events/sec with sub-second latency.

projects.name: Dev CLI Toolkit
projects.description: Open-source developer tooling for workflow automation, adopted by 500+ engineers.

frontend-engineer.title: Frontend Engineer
frontend-engineer.subtitle: Frontend Engineer & UI Specialist
frontend-engineer.tagline: Crafting pixel-perfect interfaces that users actually enjoy
frontend-engineer.summary: Frontend-focused engineer with a passion for building delightful, performant user interfaces. Deep expertise in the React ecosystem, Core Web Vitals optimization, and accessible design. I bridge design and engineering to ship products that are beautiful, fast, and inclusive.

highlights: Led frontend architecture for React/Next.js platform used by 1M+ monthly users
Built and owned a design system with 100+ reusable components across 4 product teams
Improved Core Web Vitals to 95+ — LCP under 1.2s, CLS near zero, FID < 50ms
Mentored 3 junior engineers on React patterns, testing, and accessibility best practices
Developed responsive, WCAG AA-compliant UIs for 3 B2B SaaS products
Reduced JS bundle size by 45% through code splitting, lazy loading, and tree-shaking
Implemented complex micro-interactions and animations that improved conversion by 18%
Rebuilt legacy jQuery codebase to modern React, cutting bug rate by 70%
Introduced snapshot and integration testing, reaching 85% code coverage
Collaborated directly with designers to establish pixel-perfect implementation standards

projects.name: Component Design System
projects.description: 100+ component library with Storybook docs and visual regression testing, used across 4 product teams.

projects.name: Animated Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time data dashboard with complex SVG charts, smooth transitions, and live WebSocket updates.

projects.name: Performance Audit Toolkit
projects.description: Internal CLI for automated Lighthouse audits integrated into CI/CD to block performance regressions.

backend-engineer.title: Backend Engineer
backend-engineer.subtitle: Backend Engineer & Systems Architect
backend-engineer.tagline: Designing reliable, scalable infrastructure that teams ship on confidently
backend-engineer.summary: Backend engineer specializing in distributed systems, API design, and cloud infrastructure at scale. Experienced taking systems from prototype to production with 99.9% uptime SLAs. I care deeply about reliability, observability, and writing code that teams can maintain and extend for years to come.

highlights: Designed event-driven microservices handling 50M+ daily events with exactly-once semantics
Reduced API p99 latency from 800ms → 120ms through Redis caching and query optimization
Built distributed tracing and alerting pipeline across 40+ services using OpenTelemetry
Authored internal architecture RFCs adopted as standard across the engineering org
Built RESTful and GraphQL APIs serving 200k+ daily requests with sub-100ms p95
Designed multi-tenant database schema supporting 1000+ enterprise clients
Implemented rate limiting, JWT auth, and RBAC middleware used across all services
Owned backend for public APIs consumed by 50k+ daily users at 99.9% uptime
Identified and fixed N+1 query patterns reducing DB load by 60%
Introduced load testing with k6 and established performance budgets

projects.name: Event Streaming Platform
projects.description: Kafka-based event bus processing 50M+ daily events with exactly-once delivery and dead-letter queues.

projects.name: Internal API Gateway
projects.description: High-performance gateway handling auth, rate limiting, routing, and observability for 40+ microservices.

projects.name: Database Migration Framework
projects.description: Zero-downtime migration tooling for schema changes on 50M+ row tables used in 3 production services.
